footer.desc: Track verified benchmarks, compare builds, and discover realistic performance ranges.

hero.title: Find Your Real PC Performance Window
hero.subtitle: Upload, compare, and validate benchmarks with a data-first community built for enthusiasts.

home.emptyRecent: No benchmark submissions are available yet.
home.emptyRankingDesc: As soon as members submit scores, top systems will appear here.

sections.quickAccessSubtitle: Move between CPU, GPU, memory and storage streams without losing context.
sections.recentSubtitle: Fresh community data with trust, archetype and score context included.
sections.rankSubtitle: Top entries by score depth and submission quality.

stats.systemsHint: Live count from published benchmark records.

profile.title: Profile
profile.subtitle: Manage your identity, experience level and benchmark history.

kpi.submissionsHint: Total benchmarks linked to your account.
kpi.categoriesHint: How many hardware tracks you tested.
kpi.trustHint: Quality score based on data completeness.
kpi.levelHint: Community experience profile used in comments and feeds.

benchmark.submitSubtitle: Share reproducible benchmark data with clear hardware and software context.

benchmark.title: Title

benchmark.noScoreData: No score metrics were provided for this entry yet.

benchmark.percentileHint: Share of related systems below this score.
benchmark.similarSystemsSubtitle: Closest submissions in the same category and metric family.
benchmark.noSimilarDesc: Try again later as the category receives more submissions.
benchmark.commentsSubtitle: Community feedback, tuning notes and verification comments.
benchmark.beFirstComment: Be the first to add tuning context for this result.
benchmark.reviewIncompleteDesc: Complete basic info, environment details and at least one score to publish.

comment.placeholder: Share your findings, tuning details, or consistency feedback...

leaderboard.subtitle: Track top systems by raw speed or value index.

compare.needTwoDesc: Choose two or more entries from the left panel to enable chart and table comparison.

dashboard.title: Benchmark Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Explore raw submissions, ranked leaders, and performance ranges in one flow.
dashboard.rangeSubtitle: Understand spread and percentile position for each metric.
dashboard.rangeMinHint: Lowest observed value in visible dataset.
dashboard.rangeMaxHint: Highest observed value in visible dataset.

dashboard.emptyRankingDesc: Change category or refresh once new submissions are published.
dashboard.emptyRangeDesc: Select another category or include benchmarks with numeric score fields.
